107: async function seedMenuIfEmpty() {
108:   try {
109:     const existing = await storage.getMenuItems();
110:     const activeCount = existing.filter(i => i.isActive).length;
111:     if (activeCount === 0) {
112:       log("[SEED] Menu trống — đang thêm dữ liệu mặc định...");
113:       for (const item of SEED_MENU_ITEMS) {
114:         await storage.createMenuItem({ name: item.name, price: item.price, isAvailable: true, isActive: true });
115:       }
116:       log(`[SEED] Đã thêm ${SEED_MENU_ITEMS.length} món ăn.`);
117:     }
118:   } catch (err) {
119:     console.error("[SEED] Lỗi seed menu:", err);
120:   }
121: }
